title: Customers charged twice when retrying failed Stripe payment
description: Several customers report being charged twice when they retry a failed checkout. Logs show two POST /checkout calls within ~3 seconds and Stripe accepts both. Repro: trigger 3DS challenge, abandon, then click Pay again. Affects ~0.2% of attempts but each is a P0 refund.
stepsToReproduce: 1. Start checkout with a 3DS test card. 2. Trigger 3DS challenge. 3. Close the modal without completing. 4. Click Pay again immediately. 5. Both PaymentIntents succeed.

title: Marketing dashboard date picker off by one in EU timezones
description: When users in CET select 'last 7 days' the dashboard shows data from 6 days ago to today, missing yesterday. Off-by-one is consistent. UTC users are unaffected.
stepsToReproduce: 1. Set browser timezone to Europe/Berlin. 2. Open dashboard. 3. Click 'Last 7 days'. 4. Compare totals to API response.

title: Login button has 2px misalignment on Safari iOS
description: On iPhone Safari the Sign In button is 2px to the left compared to the Sign Up button below it. Visual only.

title: Webhook delivery worker crashes on payloads >1MB
description: Sentry shows Worker recycle every ~30s when traffic includes a particular tenant. Heap dump points to JSON.parse on a 1.4MB payload. Worker crash drops all in-flight webhooks for ~10s.
stepsToReproduce: Send POST /webhooks with a 1.5MB JSON body and watch worker logs.

title: Email template editor loses unsaved changes on browser back
description: If an editor user clicks the browser back button mid-edit, the campaign reopens with the previous saved version and edits are lost. No warning prompt.

title: Search returns 0 results for queries containing apostrophes
description: Searching for 'O'Brien' or 'can't' returns no results even when matching documents exist. Unescaped apostrophe likely breaking the FTS query parser.

title: Onboarding tooltip shows wrong feature name for SMB plan
description: Tooltip says 'Customer Hub' but the SMB plan calls it 'Customer Inbox'. Marketing flagged this in QA.

title: Bulk export CSV stalls at 100k rows and never completes
description: Customers with >100k contacts report exports hang. Server logs show the streaming response stops emitting after exactly 100,000 rows; no error is raised. Browser eventually times out at 5 min.
stepsToReproduce: Trigger CSV export on an account with >100k contacts and observe the response.

title: Scheduled SMS sends use account creator's timezone, not recipient's
description: Send-time optimization picks 9am in the account creator's timezone for all recipients globally, instead of the recipient's local 9am. Reported by 4 enterprise accounts this week.

title: Customer agent occasionally responds in Spanish to English chats
description: About 1% of conversations end up with the assistant switching mid-conversation to Spanish, even though the user has been writing in English. Logs show no language code in the system prompt for those threads.
